LanguageData.EE_Setting_EnableHealthUIDesc: If enabled, displays a premium medical monitor and diagnostic info at the top of the health tab. Fully compatible and co-exists with Nice Health Tab, Health Display, and RimHUD. If disabled, reverts to default style.
LanguageData.EE_Settings_EnableHealthUiOverhaulDesc: If enabled, displays a premium medical monitor and diagnostic info at the top of the health tab. Fully compatible and co-exists with Nice Health Tab, Health Display, and RimHUD. If disabled, reverts to default style.
LanguageData.EE_Settings_UseMlhBleedRateUnit: Vital Monitor Bleed Rate default to ml/h
LanguageData.EE_Settings_UseMlhBleedRateUnitDesc: If enabled, the vital monitor's bleed rate (BldR) displays in milliliters per hour (ml/h). If disabled, reverts to percent per day (%/d).
